headline: SKYWORKS SOLUTIONS INC (NASDAQ:SWKS) Offers a High, Sustainable Dividend Yield for Income Investors
summary: Skyworks Solutions (SWKS) offers a high 5.29% dividend yield, backed by a strong financial profile and a history of reliable payouts, making it a candidate for income-focused portfolios.
